nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 法屬圭亞那

nodes.name: White-thighed swallow
nodes.summary: White-thighed swallow（White-thighed swallow，学名 Atticora tibialis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联12个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-thighed swallow (Atticora tibialis) is a species of bird in the family Hirundinidae, the swallows and martins. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, French Guiana, Guyana, Panama, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | title =Birds of Venezuela | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =second | date =2003 | location =Princeton NJ | pages =689 | language =English }} Separately from extreme eastern Guyana east through Suriname into French Guiana *Atticora tibialis tibialis: southeastern Brazil mostly from southern Bahia south to eastern São Paulo state with records as far north as Pernambuco The white-thighed swallow primarily inhabits the edges and clearings of lowland evergreen forest in the tropical zone. It also occurs in more open country with scattered trees and along rivers. In elevation overall it ranges from sea level to about . In Colombia it reaches {{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M
